message:
🌱 Add temporal: Prevent incorrect service discovery with multiple Temporal mission (#1529)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "temporal-1234-prevent-incorrect-service-discovery-with-multiple-temporal-cluster",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "temporal: Prevent incorrect service discovery with multiple Temporal clusters",
+    "description": "Prevent incorrect service discovery with multiple Temporal clusters. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current temporal deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your temporal version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n temporal -l app.kubernetes.io/name=temporal\nhelm list -n temporal 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working temporal installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review temporal configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant temporal configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n temporal -l app.kubernetes.io/name=temporal\nkubectl get configmap -n temporal -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=temporal\n```\nI run multiple separate Temporal clusters within a single k8s cluster. Each Temporal cluster has its own separate set of frontend, history, and matching services as well as persistence."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Prevent incorrect service discovery with multiple Temporal…",
+        "description": "Also ran into this issue. My resolution was also to change the membership ports for the different clusters. Normally, I would not expect this to be an issue, but we had two deployments overlap for a time, which would've opened the door for IP reuse.\n\nAs requested, our deployment for Temporal using\n```yaml\n{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":\"2021-01-27T00:34:15.414Z\",\"msg\":\"Current reachable members\",\"service\":\"frontend\",\"component\":\"service-resolver\",\"service\":\"matching\",\"addresses\":\"[100.123.207.80:7235 100.123.65.65:7235 100.123.120.28:7235 100.123.60.187:7235 100.123.17.255:7235 100.123.203.172:7235]\",\"logging-call-at\":\"rpServiceResolver.go:266\"}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n temporal -l app.kubernetes.io/name=temporal\nkubectl get events -n temporal --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Prevent incorrect service discovery with multiple Temporal…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Also ran into this issue. My resolution was also to change the membership ports for the different clusters. Normally, I would not expect this to be an issue, but we had two deployments overlap for a time, which would've opened the door for IP reuse.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "{\"level\":\"info\",\"ts\":\"2021-01-27T00:34:15.414Z\",\"msg\":\"Current reachable members\",\"service\":\"frontend\",\"component\":\"service-resolver\",\"service\":\"matching\",\"addresses\":\"[192.0.2.1:7235 192.0.2.1:7235 192.0.2.1:7235 192.0.2.1:7235 192.0.2.1:7235 192.0.2.1:7235]\",\"logging-call-at\":\"rpServiceResolver.go:266\"}",
+        "apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1\nkind: NetworkPolicy\nmetadata:\n  name: temporal-network-policy\n  namespace: ns1\nspec:\n  egress:\n  - to:\n    - namespaceSelector:\n        matchLabels:\n          name: ns1\n  ingress:\n  - from:\n    - namespaceSelector:\n        matchLabels:\n          name: ns1\n  podSelector:\n    matchLabels:\n      networpolicy: temporal\n  policyTypes:\n  - Ingress\n  - Egress",
+        "apiVersion: v1\nkind: Namespace\n  labels:\n    name:namespace1\n  name: namespace1"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "temporal",
+      "community",
+      "workflow-engine",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Deployment",
+      "Node"
+    ],

+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/temporalio/temporal/issues/1234",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/temporalio/temporal"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 16,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with temporal installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
